items.title: Didier Deschamps pays price for breaking free from the shackles that led him to glory | Jonathan Wilson
items.summary: France finally let loose all their attacking power in this tournament and yet when the big test came against Spain they were too open Maybe Didier Deschamps was right all along. items.title: ITV pundit leaves World Cup with immediate effect as Mark Pougatch issues farewell message
items.summary: PLENTY of teams have gone home during the World Cup at this point with just three left standing heading into England's semi-final with Argentina tonight. items.title: ‘The aura in that interaction’ – Fans love who David Beckham was with in VIP area for France vs Spain World Cup semi
items.summary: WORLD CUP fans were left in disbelief at who David Beckham was seen with in the VIP area of the France and Spain game. items.title: ‘I will not fall into the trap’ – Didier Deschamps makes cryptic swipe at referee after France crash out of World Cup
items.summary: FRANCE boss Didier Deschamps cryptically hit out at referee Ivan Barton after his side were dumped out of the World Cup by Spain. items.title: Spain show teamwork may win out in 'World Cup of superstars'
items.summary: France's attacking firepower was the focus of the build-up to their World Cup semi-final against Spain. If it wasn't Kylian Mbappe who did the damage, it would surely be Ousmane Dembele. Or Michael Olise. Or Bradley Barcola. Or Desire Doue.

items.title: Spain book World Cup final place by beating lacklustre France
items.summary: European champions Spain are into the World Cup final after beating lacklustre France 2-0 in Dallas.

items.title: 'Extremely happy' Deschamps gets the farewell game no-one wants
items.summary: Didier Deschamps' long, storied career with France will come to an end not how he would have wanted it - in Saturday's World Cup third-place play-off.

items.title: World Cup final half-time to last up to 25 minutes
items.summary: The half-time break in Sunday's World Cup final is expected to last between 20 and 25 minutes.

items.title: Will Scots back Three Lions against Argentina - or it is 'anyone but England'?
items.summary: As England progress, possibly to a final, some Scottish football fans are making tricky decisions about where their loyalties lie.

items.summary: Falklands conflict adds ‘emotional’ edge to semi-final Manager has ‘no problem’ with Bellingham after outburst Thomas Tuchel believes England will face an Argentina team “fuelled by history” in their World Cup semi-final in Atlanta on Wednesday. items.title: Pedro Porro turns from defender to destroyer as Spain outwit France once more | Sid Lowe
items.summary: The full-back was supposed to be busy shackling France’s vaunted front line but found time to score the killer goal at the other end “Let me loose in a prison and I’ll end up owning the place,” Pedro Porro once said. items.title: ‘It means love’: Scottish World Cup fans celebrate Boston with orange traffic cone
items.summary: ‘Boston cone’ arrives to fanfare in first-class seat from Glasgow before planned trip to raise money for mental health Fresh off its first-class flight from Glasgow, it received a reception befitting a visiting dignitary: a bagpiper in full regalia playing inside Boston Logan international airport.

items.summary: THOMAS TUCHEL revealed how he has been relaxing during the World Cup as England manager. items.title: ‘What’s the pressure?’ – Marc Guehi says all heat is on Argentina ahead of England’s World Cup semi-final showdown
items.summary: MARC GUEHI says the heat is all on Argentina in Wednesday’s semi-final showdown because they need to defend their World Cup title. items.title: Former porn star Mia Khalifa rattles Argentina fans as she removes shirt in controversial World Cup video
items.summary: MIA KHALIFA revealed who she was rooting for at the World Cup with a controversial video. The former porn star shared a post on social media showing off who her support was behind as the first semi-final was being played out. items.title: Fox forced to bleep Kylian Mbappe interview after France’s World Cup semi-final defeat to Spain
items.summary: FOX SPORTS bleeped Kylian Mbappe's interview as he apologised BEFORE swearing. The gutted France captain, 27, suffered World Cup semi-final heartbreak as his side lost 2-0 to Spain in Dallas. Mbappe struggled to get into the game and his only chance of note saw him fire a free-kick harmlessly over.

items.summary: SPAIN are through to the World Cup final and Lamine Yamal's girlfriend couldn't be happier.
